# openai_project_model_permissions (Data Source)

Retrieve project model permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_model_permissions" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `mode` (String) mode
- `model_ids` (List of String) model ids
- `object` (String) object
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
